reviews.comment:
Cuando van a poner dos playeros por isla en la horas con mayor demanda? Es inumano pasar 8 hrs sin descanso con los calores de verano. Los playeros unos genios armados de paciencia atienden a todos con la mejor. Aveces se tarda más en cobrar con el celular de lo que cargan combustible. Ojalá pueda mejorar este servicio por el bien de todo el pueblo.

(Translated by Google)
When are they going to put two beach attendants per island during peak hours? It's inhumane to spend eight hours without a break in the summer heat. The beach attendants are geniuses armed with patience and serve everyone with the best of care. Sometimes it takes longer to charge a cell phone than it takes to fill up with gas. I hope this service can improve for the good of the entire community.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBeGRYNzFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Vergonzoso!!!!
No se puede creer  las demoras para lograr combustible!!!
Para colmo cuando viene el camion a descargar combustible se detiene todo!
Cuando crees que ya llegas hay cambio de turno en los playeros!
Llevar bidones para esta zona porque es una locura!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Shameful!!!!
The delays to get fuel are unbelievable!!!
To top it all off, everything stops when the truck arrives to unload fuel!
Just when you think you're about to get there, the attendants change shifts!
Bring jerrycans to this area because it's madness!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfM3NMRDJRRRAB

(Translated by Google)
I traveled two weeks ago... and the parking attendant didn't credit the points for the second car... even though I told him 20 times...

Poor service. The beach attendants seem to work in slow motion.

reviews.comment:
PESIMO SERVICIO, mejor cargar en Aimogasta.
En esta YPF los playeros tienen la misma rapidez que una babosa acalambrada, le piden permiso a un pie para mover el otro.
La atención del bar es terriblemente mala, no se cuando ypf contrató tan mal personal.
Una pena.

(Translated by Google)
TERRIBLE SERVICE, better to fill up in Aimogasta.
At this YPF station, the attendants are about as fast as a slug with cramps; they practically have to ask permission from one foot before moving the other.
The service at the bar is awful; I don't know when YPF hired such bad staff. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURma1BuNFRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Malisima atención, llevo casi 3 hr esperando para cargar y no terminan la descarga del camión. Los playeros super desorganizados, dan mal las indicaciones y para colmo no hay otra estación donde acudir. Lamentable

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I've been waiting almost 3 hours to load up and they still haven't finished unloading the truck. The attendants are incredibly disorganized, give incorrect directions, and to top it all off, there's no other station to go to. It's a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmeGY2WmNnEAE
